commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c5cfaf938a211aef3ad7ec8be6a9b70c6950a094)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `/models` auto-reply browsing to load the model catalog read-only by default, disables runtime auth discovery for that static visibility pass, and keeps explicit `all` browse on the full catalog path.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main always calls the full `loadModelCatalog({ config })` path for `/models`, and the linked issue includes timing logs showing that path is the slow step in a large LiteLLM catalog. I did not run the LiteLLM setup locally because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs contributor-visible proof and a code adjustment for provider-wildcard compatibility before normal maintainer review can proceed.

target.title: Speed up /models browse replies
target.body:
## Summary

- use the read-only model catalog for default `/models` browse replies
- disable runtime auth discovery for that static browse visibility pass, matching the fast Gateway-style behavior
- keep explicit `/models ... all` on the full catalog path

Fixes #84731.

## Local verification

In a LiteLLM-backed environment with about 410 configured models, runtime patch testing reduced the auto-reply command timings from roughly:

- `/models`: ~69s -> ~1.3s
- `/models litellm`: ~28-32s -> ~1.3s
- `/models list litellm`: ~32s -> ~1.3s

Explicit `all` remains on the full path and stayed slow by design.

## Tests

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.auto-reply-reply.config.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-models.test.ts`
target.author: safrano9999
